condition: Possible rotator cuff tear and bursitis
pain_nature: Dull ache, sharp pain with movement
previous_history: Only occasional mild shoulder strain, which usually resolved with rest.
functional_limitations: Activities such as lifting my arm, reaching overhead, carrying heavy objects, pushing or pulling, and even routine movements like dressing or combing my hair significantly worsen the pain.
medical_history: Do not have any known history of major shoulder injuries or other significant medical conditions.
red_flags: Numbness, tingling sensations, and noticeable weakness in my arm
treatments_taken: Taking anti-inflammatory medications, resting my shoulder, avoiding activities that worsen the pain
